alkylation reagent: Free Cys are capped with NEM
cleavage agent: the samples were digested at 37 °C overnight with trypsin
collision energy: Normalized collision energy was set at 27
fractionation method: samples loaded onto 4−20% Bio-Rad Criterion Tris-HCl gels for separation by SDS-PAGE
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap XL mass spectrometer
labeling: quantified with the label-free MaxLFQ algorithm
reduction reagent: final concentration 10 mM, stock solution 200 mM H2O
